name: Pagos
description: AI-powered payment intelligence platform turning disparate payments data into actionable routing insights.

seo.title: Pagos — Payments Orchestration
seo.meta_description: Pagos: AI-powered payment intelligence platform turning disparate payments data into actionable routing insights.

when_to_use: Optimizing PSP routing using AI-driven payment performance data
Analyzing authorization rates by PSP, card type, and geography
Reducing payment failures with real-time routing intelligence

pros: Clean product design from ex-Stripe team
cons: Analytics, not routing — you still need an orchestrator
Requires clean data feeds from every PSP
Value depends on volume and PSP count
review.verdict: Best-in-class payments intelligence for teams with multiple PSPs; it complements, but does not replace, orchestration.
review.best_for: Mid-market and enterprise merchants with 2+ PSPs who want cross-provider performance analytics.
review.not_for: Single-PSP teams or those expecting routing and acquiring from the same product.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
